name: Cream Cheese Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 15 minutes Bake time: 10 Minutes
1. Heat oven to 375°F.
2. In a medium bowl, cream the Butter Flavor Crisco, softened Cream Cheese, and Milk using an electric mixer on medium speed until well blended. Add Sugar and Vanilla, mixing until combined. Stir in Flour and chopped Pecans until just incorporated.
3. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough 2 inches apart onto an ungreased baking sheet.
4. Bake for 10 minutes at 375°F. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack.
Makes 3 dozen 2-inch cookies.
Lemon or Orange Variation: Add 1/2 teaspoon grated Lemon or Orange peel to the dough.
